errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"error":"unauthorized","errorCode":"missing_bearer_token","message":"MCP request has no Bearer access token. Clients probe /mcp before OAuth completes.","remediation":"Complete OAuth in MCP Inspector (Authentication → Quick OAuth) or Cursor MCP settings, then reconnect. Ensure the auth app is running at https://app.socialfetch.dev.","oauthIssuer":"https://app.socialfetch.dev"}
